ShortDescription.SourceString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">With their chill confidence and effortless style, Toni rules the ramps.</>
Drop in and carve your own way with the Skate Park Royalty Pack featuring:
ShortDescription.LocalizedString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">With their chill confidence and effortless style, Toni rules the ramps.</>
Drop in and carve your own way with the Skate Park Royalty Pack featuring:

SubTitleText.SourceString:
Challenges unlocked after having completed the "Homebase Stormshield Defense 3" mission in "Save the World" Campaign.

V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite Battle Royale and Creative modes. You can purchase new customization items like Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, Wraps and the latest season's Battle Pass! Gliders and Contrails may not not be used in Save the World mode.
SubTitleText.LocalizedString:
Challenges unlocked after having completed the "Homebase Stormshield Defense 3" mission in "Save the World" Campaign.

V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite Battle Royale and Creative modes. You can purchase new customization items like Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, Wraps and the latest season's Battle Pass! Gliders and Contrails may not not be used in Save the World mode.

DisclaimerText.SourceString: Note: Not all items may be available in Save the World mode.
DisclaimerText.LocalizedString: Note: Not all items may be available in Save the World mode.
